acctinputoctets.description: Number of octets received from the client during the session

acctoutputoctets.description: Number of octets sent to the client during the session

acctsessiontime.description: Duration of the session, in seconds

acctterminatecause.description: Reason for termination of this session

ap_name.description: Access point name associated with the session

arubauserrole.description: Aruba user role of the session

arubauservlan.description: Aruba user vlan of the session

calledstationid.description: MAC address of the network access device

callingstationid.description: Calling-Station-Id attribute; often the MAC address of the client

mac_address.description: MAC address of the client device

nasipaddress.description: IP address of the network access device

nasportid.description: Port identifier assigned by the network access device

nasporttype.description: Port type reported by the network access device

role_name.description: Role name of the user associated with the session

sponsor_name.description: Sponsor of the guest user associated with the session

sponsor_profile_name.description: Operator profile name of the sponsor

state.description: The current state of the session (active, stale, closed).

total_traffic.description: Total number of octets sent and received during the session

updated_at.description: Time when the session record was last updated

message.description: Describes the result of the operation

confirm_disconnect.description: Flag to confirm disconnecting the active session

id.description: ID of the session to disconnect

items.description: List of items matching the filter

count.description: Total number of items matching the filter; returned if calculate_count is true

confirm_reauthorize.description: Flag to confirm the session reauthorization

reauthorize_profile.description: Specify the name of the reauthorization profile to apply to the session

first.description: URL of first page of results

last.description: URL of last page of results

next.description: URL of next page of results

prev.description: URL of previous page of results

message.description: Describes the result of the operation

status.description: Describes the status of the operation

enforcement_profile.description: List of enforcement profiles applicable for the given MAC
When performing CoA, the 'enforcement_profile' parameter MUST be provided

profiles.description: List of reauthorization profiles that may be applied to the session

dyn_authz_action_name.description: Name of SessionControl action that was used (enforcement profile name)

message.description: SessionControl action message either success or failure

items.description: List of items matching the filter.

action_id.description: Unique ID to fetch synchronously or an asynchronously performed session action

count.description: Total number of sessions matched by the filter

count_failed.description: Number of sessions that have been processed with failure or not able to process

count_queue.description: Number of sessions that have not yet been processed

count_success.description: Number of sessions that have been processed successfully

enforcement_profile.description: When performing CoA, the 'enforcement_profile' parameter MUST be provided, e.g. "enforcement_profile":["...", "...'"]

filter.description: JSON filter expression specifying the items to return, e.g. "filter":{"username":"admin", ...}
